desc: Replaced hand-rolled v7 UUID helper with github.com/google/uuid.NewString() (v4). Same-millisecond collision bug eliminated; see CHANGELOG Unreleased.
Removed unused --data-dir CLI flag (was paired with deleted agent/src/executor.rs placeholder).
Removed unused --mdns-domain CLI flag (was paired with deleted agent/src/discovery.rs placeholder).

Removed --rdma CLI flag (was paired with deleted agent/src/network.rs placeholder). ARCHITECTURE.md forward-looking mentions of the future rdma-shim crate / rdma.rs module are allowed because they describe planned (not yet implemented) features. _test.go allowlist permits unused-symbol mentions in test fixtures (e.g. fixture filenames) without tripping the guard every time a developer happens to choose a memorable test string.
Removed internal/registry.safeHostname summary helper — GetNodes responses now map NodeResources fields directly (Hostname/CPU/Memory/GPUs) inside internal/restapi.
Removed placeholder agent modules (discovery.rs, network.rs, memory.rs, executor.rs, metrics.rs) that were ~15-line stubs. agent/src/main.rs now only declares gpu/heartbeat/resources.
